content:
Ever since the latest story chapter update, none of the character or mobs sprite are appearing on the screen. This bug is prevalent and consistent throughout all combat stages with the exception of Traphase because I haven't tried it there yet. I don't know if this count as "replicating" the bug but the sprites only reappear after applying barriers (specifically in this instance from Tawil's six wings) and during Xu's exalt momentarily. Other than that idk how else I could "replicate" the bug and would love helpful instructions on how to do it. I have tried using the fix on the login screen two times and even deleting & redownloading the game but to no success.

This is not the first place I came to report this bug as you can see from the two other images. I find telling me to do the thing I've done prior to contacting support incredibly unhelpful & unprofessional and would prefer this line of response to be improved in the future. Even saying you couldn't do anything about it or just acknowledging my proactive action before telling me to do the same thing again is 100x more helpful than the aforementioned.

Also if you're indeed more responsive here than you are in-game, I suggest linking your discord with a supplementary "we are more responsive with bug reports in discord" message in full english in the support interface because not all players are on other platforms like reddit that have people that can tell them that.
thread_title: 💭「Processing」Sprites of any kind not showing normally

content: First of all, thank you very much for your feedback again. We apologize for the inconvenience caused by making you repeat the operation. Regarding the model disappearing issue, we have received several reports and are working hard to investigate the problem...

content:
I completely understand your frustration, especially with your commute. Let me report this Steam login issue to the team immediately and do my best to get it sorted out for you.
In the meantime, since you mentioned you have a new mobile account, you can actually reach out to our Customer Support directly through that mobile account to report this problem. This might be a faster way to get help while we investigate the Steam side of things.

content:
Thank you for getting back to me. I completely understand your situation.
We currently support Steam login on iOS devices, so it is possible that there might be a bug causing the option not to appear for you. To help us investigate this further, could you please send me a screenshot of your login screen on your mobile device when you have a moment at work?
I will also prepare a reference image to show you exactly what the correct login interface should look like. Thank you for your patience and cooperation!<:pray:1356053116260454534>
